use_cases: Dropdown selection in web forms for choosing from predefined options
Filtering data views in dashboards and admin panels
Category selection in e-commerce product filters
Language or region selection in settings menus
Multi-step form wizards requiring single-option input
ai_summary: A styled select/dropdown component for choosing from a list of options. Features customizable styling via Tailwind CSS with rounded corners and flexbox layout. Designed for use in forms, filters, and settings interfaces across SaaS, e-commerce, and fintech applications. Supports both desktop and mobile platforms with touch-friendly interactions.
